name: Kaito Kyōiku
bio: Egalitarianism: Every individual deserves equal opportunities and treatment. A society is only as strong as its weakest member.

name: Akira Kōkoku
bio: Hierarchy: With great power comes great responsibility. A strong leader is necessary to guide and protect the weak.
motivation: Consolidating power for the greater good

name: Lila Ryūki
bio: Synthesis: The truth lies in balance. Egalitarianism and hierarchy are not mutually exclusive.
speech_style: Whispered, with a tilt of the head
motivation: Seeking harmony through dialogue and understanding

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
